issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: HAs and TCs were receiving double tasks for Loan Simple leads across multiple workflows including pre-referral and post-referral. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and the issue was resolved.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close out the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked as Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving weekly check-in tasks from the post-referral workflow even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filter was not correctly suppressing enrollment for these deal stages. A tweak to the filters was made to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral tasks received for deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO reassignment
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The fix was handled by Luis on the product side. The specific root cause was not stated.
issues.workaround: For deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually send updated agent introduction emails with the correct LO information.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage is toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved from Offer Accepted back to a prior stage and then returned to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger to collect closing information. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were cycled back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals moved to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to the Offer Accepted stage were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs received no tasks for these deals. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the issue was resolved. The root cause was not explicitly stated.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were moved to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1 and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks after referral accepted on March 18
issues.desc: An HA reported receiving no tasks from the Post Referral Workflow after a referral was made and accepted on March 18th. The root cause was an error in how data was being pulled, preventing the workflow from filtering correctly. The issue was escalated to product.
issues.workaround: Manually review and action any post-referral tasks for deals referred around March 18 that did not receive automated tasks.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent at Offer Accepted stage without credit amount populated
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their credit amount was being sent at the Offer Accepted stage before closing information had been submitted, resulting in a message that omitted the actual credit amount. The SMS should only send at the Sale Pending stage once the credit amount is calculable. It was confirmed to be a dashboard-triggered communication and escalated to product.
issues.workaround: Manually send buyers the correct credit amount SMS at the Sale Pending stage for any deals that received the premature SMS during the impact window.
